nodes.label: AI as curiosity-driven exploration tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to simple factual queries
nodes.grounding_span: The quickness and ease in which I would receive information and uncover information about things I was interested in spurred my curiosity

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: In the beginning, some responses were vague or inaccurate; hallucinations were commonplace

nodes.label: AI as collaborative enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: Typically, I'm using AI collaboratively - having it help me come up with ideas or approaches

nodes.label: Maintaining personal voice and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I don't every blindly accept something AI tells me or writes for me, because maintaining my voice is important

nodes.label: Responsible AI integration with foundational skills
nodes.label_negative: Premature over-reliance on AI without discernment
nodes.grounding_span: I think it's important for staff, especially new professionals, to first develop good research skills and work ethic so they don't prematurely become too reliant on AI

nodes.label: AI as skill expander and learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped expand my skill set

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer freeing time for higher-level work
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of inefficiency and frustration
nodes.grounding_span: AI has freed up time I used to spend on mundane, repetitive, or mentally draining tasks

nodes.label: AI as creative and visual communication enabler
nodes.label_negative: AI limitations in graphical outputs and data storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: I'm very excited for the day where one can quickly get a customized image quickly, without weird quirks or artifacts

nodes.label: Personal growth and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I also learned new skills and terminology along the way

nodes.label: Workplace productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Some tasks that would have taken me days to complete are now done in hours

nodes.label: Professional integrity and responsible practice
nodes.grounding_span: I strongly believe that AI is a tool not a replacement for good work

nodes.label: Creative expression and communication
nodes.grounding_span: Having an AI to help bring the ideas I have in my head to fruition would be amazing

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: I recently felt particularly satisfied with I used AI collaboratively to set up code

nodes.label: Frustration with AI contradictions and slow responses
nodes.grounding_span: when a chat gets bogged down with a lot of data sharing or back and forth, the long response times are irritating

nodes.label: Optimistic excitement about AI evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I'm excited to evolve myself with AI, and for AI platforms to evolve

nodes.label: Advocacy for responsible AI use with caution
nodes.grounding_span: I'm also an advocate for being careful who gets the green-light to use AI

nodes.label: Iterative testing and verification — checks accuracy and refines prompts
nodes.grounding_span: I find that when I check the accuracy of responses, there are less likely to have bad information

nodes.label: Historical analogical reasoning — draws parallels to past technological shifts
nodes.grounding_span: It won't be the first time in history when a new technology has eliminated certain jobs in the workforce
